title: limonium procerum
intro: Limonium procerum, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils such as linalool and beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of Limonium procerum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and essential oils, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
